intended_use: cmTriage is a passive notification for prioritization-only, parallel-workflow software tool used by radiologists to prioritize specific patients within the standard-of-care image worklist for 2D FFDM
intended_use_full: cmTriage is a passive notification for prioritization-only, parallel-workflow software tool used by radiologists to prioritize specific patients within the standard-of-care image worklist for 2D FFDM screening mammograms. cmTriage uses an artificial intelligence algorithm to analyze 2D FFDM screening mammograms and flags those that are suggestive of the presence of at least one suspicious finding at the exam level.
target_condition: breast cancer screening; detection of suspicious findings in screening mammograms
ground_truth: Biopsy-confirmed cancers and BIRADS 1-2 with two-year follow-up negative diagnosis
other_metrics: Area under curve (AUC) by breast density - Density 1: 0.964 (95% CI 0.934-0.994); Density 2: 0.964 (95% CI 0.946-0.981); Density 3: 0.940 (95% CI 0.917-0.963); Density 4: 0.958 (95% CI 0.92-0.995). AUC by lesion type - Mass: 0.941 (95% CI 0.923-0.959); Calcifications: 0.972 (95% CI 0.958-0.985). At 84.4% sensitivity, specificity 94.0% with 4.1% false positive rate; adjusted for 0.5% cancer prevalence, 6.4% suspicious rate. At default 93% sensitivity, specificity 76.3% with 16.1% false positive rate; adjusted for prevalence, 24% suspicious rate. Processing time: average 3.35 minutes. Population-adjusted mark rate 6.37% at 84.4% sensitivity vs. radiologist recall rate 9.60%.
